task_completion.description: The RadiationTherapy project is accessed in the IDE or terminal.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Eclipse IDE open with the 'RadiationTherapy' project visible in the Package Explorer, or a terminal navigated to the project directory.

task_completion.description: DoseCalculator.java is updated with the Inverse Square Law correction.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'DoseCalculator.java' open in the editor showing the specific code: 'Math.pow(distanceSourceToTumor / 100.0, 2)'.

task_completion.description: CalibrationConstants.java is updated with the new linear accelerator factor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'CalibrationConstants.java' open in the editor showing the specific code: 'public static final double LINEAR_ACCELERATOR_FACTOR = 1.035;'.

task_completion.description: The DoseTest JUnit test is executed and passes successfully.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Eclipse JUnit view showing a solid green progress bar for 'DoseTest', or a terminal window showing a successful Maven test execution ('BUILD SUCCESS' with 0 failures) for DoseTest.
Look at the file tabs in the Eclipse editor; there should be no asterisk (*) next to the filenames (e.g., DoseCalculator.java, CalibrationConstants.java), indicating all changes have been saved.

integrity.description: The test results come from a genuine test runner and are not faked.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the test success is displayed in the actual Eclipse JUnit view or standard Maven terminal output, rather than a text file, echo command, or manually typed output.

integrity.description: The DoseTest.java file was not modified to bypass the actual physics checks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure 'DoseTest.java' does not show signs of being edited (e.g., no asterisk on its tab, no visible removal of assertions, or hardcoded 'assertTrue(true)').

integrity.description: The patch was applied to the actual project files, not just viewed or edited in a separate location.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check the file paths in the editor tabs or terminal to ensure the modified files are located within the '/home/ga/eclipse-workspace/RadiationTherapy/src/main/java/com/med/physics/' directory.
